name: Bubbles
author: Poki
description: Bubbles is a bubble-shooter puzzle game in which your goal is to pop all the bubbles from your screen. You can do so by aiming to group at least three instances of the same colored bubbles. Try and make large chains to increase your points as well as the overall fun! How high can you score in Bubbles? How to play: Shoot - Left Mouse Button About the creator: Bubbles is created by CoolGames.
